note: Official TIE 2023 Ordinary Secondary Education syllabus PDFs. uploads/documents/sw-* = 2023 revised edition (used). uploads/files/* = older 2018/2019 edition (NOT used).

unavailable.Arabic: TIE lists sw-1727256074 (KIARABU ... FINAL SYLLABUS) on its publications page, but the link returns HTTP 404 (broken on TIE's server). Retry later or source from ol.tie.go.tz.
unavailable.Civics: No standalone 2023 Ordinary Secondary Civics syllabus was published. In the 2023 revised curriculum, Civics content was folded into 'Historia ya Tanzania na Maadili' (taught in Kiswahili), which is included above.
unavailable.French: No 2023 sw-* Ordinary Secondary syllabus located. Not published as a document on tie.go.tz at time of search.
unavailable.Chinese: No 2023 sw-* Ordinary Secondary syllabus located. Only an older uploads/files edition ('SYLLABUS FOR CHINESSE LANGUAGE (O'LEVEL)') existed previously; the 2023 revised version is not yet posted.
